# I. Screen Overview

The Top Distilleries section appears on the Home page as a ranked list of the 5 most active distilleries on the platform, measured by their **lifetime transaction volume** (Tier 1). For "cold-start" distilleries with no trade history, the list is backfilled using **Estimated Market Value** (Tier 2). This tiered ranking ensures the leaderboard is always populated with high-relevance entities, giving buyers and sellers a quick read on market dominance and credible investment signals.

-   Screen URL: / (Home page)
    
-   User Role(s): Authenticated users
    
-   Entry Point(s):
    

-   Direct access to /
    
-   Logo click from any page
    

  

# II. UI Elements Table

## 1. Section: Top Distilleries

![](data:image/png;base64,)

| # | Component | Type | Description | States / Variants |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Section Title | Heading (H2) | "Top Distilleries" | \_ |
| 2 | Ranked List Container | List Container | Vertical list of 5 distillery cards | Default, Loading |
| 3 | Distillery Card | Card | Individual ranked distillery card (see Component Details below) | Default, Hover |
| 4 | View All Link | Text Link | "View all distilleries →" — navigates to distillery listing | Default, Hover |

  

## 2\. Distillery Card — Detailed Specs

Each card is composed of two sub-sections as annotated in the design spec image:

-   Distillery-information
    
-   Distillery-market-data
    

### Layout Overview

![](data:image/png;base64,)

### Sub-Components Table

![](data:image/png;base64,)

  

| # | Component | Type | Description | Data Source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| C1 | Card Container | Container | Full clickable card → /distillery/{distilleryId} | \- |
| C2 | Rank Badge | Badge | Rank number (1–5) | Computed rank by **Tiered Sort Strategy** (Tier 1: volume, Tier 2: estMarketValue), tie-broken by master cask count and ID |
| C3 | Distillery Image | Image | Distillery logo or placeholder icon (if no image) | distillery.imageUrl |
| C4 | Distillery Name | Text | Full distillery name | distillery.name |
| C5 | Cask Count | Text | "{N} casks" — total number of master casks belonging to this distillery | distillery.caskCount |
| C6 | Med. Price Label | Text Label | **Live:** "Med. Price" / **Cold Start:** "Est. Price" | Switches when `medianPrice` is null |
| C7 | Med. Price Value | Text | **Live:** "£{medianPrice}" — median of completed transaction prices. **Cold Start:** "£{estMedianPrice}" — median midpoint valuation across active variants; muted grey italic. No range sub-label on card (range spans vintages and is too wide to be informative). Tooltip: "Estimated median valuation across {activeVariantCount} active cask vintages — prices vary by vintage and age. No trades recorded yet." If null, display `—` | `medianPrice ?? estMedianPrice` |
| C8 | Med. Price Delta | Delta Badge | **Non-null:** "▲ +X.X% (30D)" or "▼ -X.X% (30D)" — per Delta Badge Display Rules below. **Null:** hide badge entirely | `medianPriceDelta30D` |
| C9 | Volume Label | Text Label | **Live:** "Volume" / **Cold Start:** "Est. Value" | Switches when `lifetimeVolume == 0` or null |
| C10 | Volume Value | Text | **Live:** "£{lifetimeVolume}" — total value of completed trades. **Cold Start:** "£{estMarketValue}" — sum of midpoint valuations across active variants; muted grey italic. Tooltip: "Estimated total portfolio value across {activeVariantCount} active cask vintages based on admin valuations. No trades recorded yet." If null, display `—` | `lifetimeVolume > 0 ? lifetimeVolume : estMarketValue` |
| C11 | Volume Delta | Delta Badge | **Non-null:** "▲ +X.X% (30D)" or "▼ -X.X% (30D)" — per Delta Badge Display Rules below. **Null:** hide badge entirely | `volumeDelta30D` |

  

### Delta Badge Display Rules

| Condition | Icon | Color | Format |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Delta > 0 | ▲ | Green | ▲ +{value}% (30D) |
| Delta < 0 | ▼ | Red | ▼ -{value}% (30D) |
| Delta = 0 | — | Muted grey | — 0.0% (30D) |
| Delta = null | *(hidden)* | — | **Hide the badge entirely** — do not render anything |

  

### Image Fallback Rules

-   If distillery.imageUrl is null or fails to load → display a globe icon placeholder (🌐) in a grey circle, matching the mid-fi wireframe convention.
    

#   

# III. Field Validations

This section is read-only display data; there are no user input fields. No validations apply.

  

# IV. Cases and Flows

## 1. Load Top Distilleries on Home Page

| Aspect | Detail |
| --- | --- |
| Trigger | On Home page load (alongside other curated list sections) |

  

### Loading State

-   Show 8 skeleton cards in place of real cards
    

### Success State

-   Render up to 5 distillery cards, ordered by rank (1 = highest lifetime volume)
    
-   Rank badge shows the ordinal rank (1–5)
    
-   All metric fields are populated with live data from API
    
-   Delta badges are colored green (up) or red (down) per rules above
    
-   If `medianPriceDelta30D` or `volumeDelta30D` is null → **hide the delta badge entirely** (do not render anything)
    
-   **Cold Start:** If `lifetimeVolume == 0` or null → switch label to "Est. Value", render `estMarketValue` in muted grey italic. Tooltip: "Estimated total portfolio value across {activeVariantCount} active cask vintages based on admin valuations. No trades recorded yet."
    
-   **Cold Start:** If `medianPrice` is null → switch label to "Est. Price", render `estMedianPrice` in muted grey italic. No range sub-label on card. Tooltip: "Estimated median valuation across {activeVariantCount} active cask vintages — prices vary by vintage and age. No trades recorded yet."


### Error States

| Error Condition | FE Behavior (Production) | User Message (Production) | FE Behavior (Staging) | Dev Message (Staging) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Server Error (5xx) | Hide the entire section | Section is silently hidden; no error message shown to user | Show error banner inside section | ⚠️ \[DEV\] Server Error {statusCode}: Failed to load Top Distilleries. Check API logs. |
| Timeout (>5s) | Hide the entire section | Section is silently hidden; no error message shown to user | Show error banner inside section | ⚠️ \[DEV\] Request Timeout: Top Distilleries API did not respond within 5s. |
| Unauthorized | Redirect the user to /log-in |   
 | Redirect the user to /log-in |   
 |

###   

### Empty State

-   If the API returns an empty array (no qualifying distilleries): hide the entire section. Do not render the section heading or a "no data" message
    

##   

##   

## 2. User Interaction — Click Distillery Card

| Aspect | Detail |
| --- | --- |
| Trigger | User clicks anywhere on a distillery card |

  

### Behavior

-   Navigate to the Distillery detail page: /distillery/{distilleryId}
    

## 3\. User Interaction — Click "View All"

| Aspect | Detail |
| --- | --- |
| Trigger | User clicks "View all" button |

  

### Behavior

-   Navigate to the Distillery listing page: /distilleries
    

  

# V. Edge Cases & FE-only Logic

| # | Scenario | Expected FE Behavior |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | `lifetimeVolume = 0` or null for a card (Cold Start) | Switch Volume label to **"Est. Value"**. Render `estMarketValue` in **muted grey italic**. Tooltip: "Estimated total portfolio value across {activeVariantCount} active cask vintages based on admin valuations. No trades recorded yet." `volumeDelta30D` will be null → delta badge hidden. If `estMarketValue` is null, display `—` |
| 1a | `medianPrice` is null for a card (Cold Start) | Switch Med. Price label to **"Est. Price"**. Render `estMedianPrice` in **muted grey italic**. **No range sub-label** — cross-vintage range is too wide to be informative on a card. Tooltip: "Estimated median valuation across {activeVariantCount} active cask vintages — prices vary by vintage and age. No trades recorded yet." `medianPriceDelta30D` will be null → delta badge hidden. If `estMedianPrice` is null, display `—` |
| 1b | Mixed list: some cards have real trades, some are Cold Start | Cards with real trades render normally. Cold Start cards render with Est. labels. No special section-level handling needed — per-card logic applies independently |
| 2 | `medianPriceDelta30D` or `volumeDelta30D` is null | **Hide the delta badge entirely** — do not render anything. Applies regardless of reason (Cold Start, insufficient 30D history, etc.) |
| 3 | Distillery has no imageUrl | Render image placeholder |
| 4 | Distillery name is very long (>30 chars) | Truncate with ellipsis on 1 line max |
| 5 | caskCount = 1 | Display "1 cask" (singular) |
| 6 | caskCount = 0 | Display "0 casks" |
| 7 | API returns fewer than 5 distilleries | Render only the returned cards. No empty placeholder cards for missing ranks |
| 8 | Delta value is very large (>999%) | Display raw value without truncation — e.g., ▲ +1,200% (30D) |
| 9 | User navigates to /distillery/{distilleryId} with an invalid distillery ID | Return 404 page |

  

# V. Accessibility Requirements

| # | Requirement | Importance |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Each distillery card has a unique id attribute: distillery-card-{rank}(e.g., distillery-card-1) | Low |
| 2 | Rank badge has aria-label="Ranked #{rank}" for screen readers | High |
| 3 | Distillery image has alt="{distilleryName} logo"(or alt="Distillery image placeholder" if missing) | High |
| 4 | Delta badges use aria-label to convey direction: e.g., aria-label="Up 1.2% over 30 days" | Low |
| 5 | Card is keyboard-navigable (focusable via Tab; activatable via Enter)And Focus indicator visible on card hover/focus state | High |

  

\---
